name: creatorAffiliation
description: ROR (Research Organization Registry) identifier(s) for the institutional affiliation(s) of creators and contributors.
ExpectedUse: Unambiguous identification of research organizations, universities, laboratories, and other institutions associated with creators of research outputs.
